case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA), N.A. VS. MARCOS R ALMEIDA et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR APR-16-2013 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK(USA), N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT ALMEIDA, MARCOS R DOES 1 TO 15, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-26-2012
